section.heading: Annual report on nuclear transfer activities
section.chapeau: Beginning with the fiscal year 1983 and for each fiscal year thereafter, the President shall prepare and transmit to the Congress, as part of the presentation materials for foreign assistance programs proposed for that fiscal year, a classified report describing the nuclear programs and related activities of any country for which a waiver of section 2799aa or 2799aa–1 of this title is in effect, including an assessment of—

paragraph.content: the extent and effectiveness of International Atomic Energy Agency safeguards at that country’s nuclear facilities; and
the capability, actions, and intentions of the government of that country with respect to the manufacture or acquisition of a nuclear explosive device.

note.heading: Codification
note.p: Section was enacted as part of the International Security and Development Cooperation Act of 1981, and not as part of the Foreign Assistance Act of 1961 which comprises this chapter.

note.heading: Effective Date of 1994 Amendment
note.p: Amendment by Pub. L. 103–236 effective 60 days after Apr. 30, 1994, see section 831 of Pub. L. 103–236, set out as an Effective Date note under section 6301 of this title.
